objective: Create C3-PR1 as a public-safe Checkpoint 3A planning and guardrails slice. Positive claims: C3A-PLAN-001 records the sequence 3A non-cloned product-faithful controlled demo, 3B cloned-identity consent/provenance, 3C clone-integrated controlled demo, production later; C3A-PLAN-002 defines a public-safe acceptance matrix for arbitrary approved project knowledge, grounded script generation, audience/depth/style influence, fluent UI-claimed languages including non-romanized Hindi, citation/eval/source-run/claim binding through derived artifacts, playable media or explicitly approved local equivalent, access/quota/retention/deletion/tombstone, redacted observability, security, performance, API, browser E2E, and executable output-correctness gates; C3A-GATE-001 adds a failing-by-design checkpoint3 acceptance skeleton with planned API, language, media, access/quota/retention, security/observability, performance, real-browser no-success-interception, and output-correctness probes; C3A-SCOPE-001 adds exact changed-file allowlist coverage and regression tests rejecting unrelated files. Negative invariants: no backend/frontend/provider/RAG/avatar/database/Docker/runtime product implementation beyond the acceptance-gate skeleton; no cloned voice, cloned face, digital twin, real-person likeness, public URL, provider setup, provider SDK, provider key, real provider call, paid spend, public distribution, or production-readiness claim; no private plan, internal strategy, reviewer targeting, provider strategy, secrets, private media, real personal data, or provider payloads committed.
